chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 574 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.3382/2025 2. For orders on office objection No.1,2,3 & 14 3. For orders on Misc. No.3076/2025 4. For orders on Misc. No.3077/2025 5. For hearing of main case 17.02.2025 Mr. Faiz Durrani, advocate for the petitioner Serious office objections have been raised inter alia that the controversy sought to be adjudicated herein is subject matter of two pending suits, copies whereof are available at pages 185 and 243 respectively. The prior suit has been filed by the petitioner and in the latter suit admittedly the petitioner has preferred proceedings to be impleaded as defendant. Under such circumstances, concurrent recourse to writ jurisdiction could not be justified. Perusal of the prayer clauses demonstrates that the petition has not been filed to assert any rights of the petitioner and on the contrary negative declarations are being sought in respect of respondents. The law with respect to negative declarations is very clear and no case has been made out to entertain the plea for such relief in the present facts and circumstances. The petition found to be prima facie misconceived, hence, while granting urgency, the same is dismissed in limine along with other pending application/s. Judge Judge Amjad
